A.label: Well-established
criteria: Three or more independent peer-reviewed studies
Validated in two or more distinct populations

B.label: Supported
criteria: One or two peer-reviewed longitudinal studies (n>=100)
No strong contradicting evidence in the literature

C.label: Provisional
criteria: Single study, or cross-sectional only, or small n
Used as a model parameter only when no better data exists

D.label: Unknown
criteria: No quantitative data in the published literature
Channel or quantity hypothesised but unmeasured
